title: Mu Bingmei
content:
For her Avatar, and its role in Books 1-7, see: 
Liu Mei

Mu Bingmei
 is One of the supporting characters in 
Renegade Immortal
 . She was the Saintess of the former 
Brilliant Void Realm
 before going with Wang Lin's clone. She is the current Sect Master of 
God Sect
.

Contents

1

Background

2

History

2.1

Book Eight

2.2

2.3

Book Ten

2.4

Book Eleven

2.5

Book Thirteen

3

Trivia

Background
[
]

In order to cultivate her sect's most profound and powerful spell, one must obtain the Thousand Illusion Ruthless Domain and evolve it into the Ten Thousand Illusion Demon Domain.

Mu Bingmei decided to use a shortcut wherein she made nine Avatars of herself and sent to distant parts of the 
Alliance Star System
 to each cultivate a part of her grand dao.

She sent 
Liu Mei
 to 
Planet Suzaku
 where she had a fateful encounter with 
Wang Lin
.

History
[
]

Book Eight
[
]

Somehow, she became 
Zhou Ru
's Teacher after she left 
Planet Suzaku
. Before Wang Lin left the 
Alliance Star System
, he visited the 
Brilliant Void Realm
 to leave Zhou Ru under 
Qing Lin
. At that time, he ended all his past disputes with Liu Mei (and in effect with Mu Bingmei).

Book Nine
[
]

During the 100 years when Wang Lin was stuck in the 
Seven-Colored Realm
, 
Tuo Sen
 escaped from the 
Sea of Devils
. He nearly destroyed the Allheaven Army, the 
Four Divine Sect
, the 
Cultivation Alliance
, and the 
Corpse Sect
. He also killed every one from the Brilliant Void Realm except Zhou Ru, who was with Qing Lin, and Mu Bingmei on whom he left an imprint. Mu Bingmei escaped to the 
Cloud Sea Star System
 where she met Wang Lin and told him about Tuo Sen's escape. Wang Lin also absorbed Tuo Sen's imprint which helped to further stabilize his sixth star.

Book Ten
[
]

Book Eleven
[
]

When Wang Lin invited others to reincarnate on the Immortal Astral Continent, she ultimately chose to remain inside the Cave World. She appeared only to see Wang Lin off.

Book Thirteen
[
]

After Wang Lin returns to the Cave World, he puts himself and Mu Bingmei in a Dao Dream for one lifetime together. Mu Bingmei lives as Liu Mei for this life time, becoming the mother of Wang Ping in a mortal life. After they wake, Wang Lin asks her to close her eyes. When she opens her eyes she departs with a Wang Lin who she cannot tell whether it is the original or an avatar, leaving the Cave World for parts unknown.

Trivia
[
]

It is implied that the Wang Lin Mu Bingmei departs with was created by Wang Lin using his True and False Domain, as he describes there being "No real answer" to whether or not it is the real him or an Avatar.
